# work-jiang — external research

Operator-curated **source texts** for the Jiang book/site project (not Voice knowledge until merged through the gate).

| Kind | Path |
|------|------|
| Lecture notes + transcripts | [lectures/](lectures/) — e.g. [Geo-Strategy #1](lectures/geo-strategy-01-iran-strategy-matrix-2024-04-24.md), [#2](lectures/geo-strategy-02-christian-zionism-middle-east-conflict.md), [#3](lectures/geo-strategy-03-how-empire-is-destroying-america.md), [#4](lectures/geo-strategy-04-saudi-arabia-trump-card-against-iran.md), [#5](lectures/geo-strategy-05-why-trump-will-win-nikki-haley-vp.md), [#6](lectures/geo-strategy-06-americas-imperial-hubris.md), [#7](lectures/geo-strategy-07-who-killed-iranian-president-ebrahim-raisi.md), [#8](lectures/geo-strategy-08-the-iran-trap.md), [#9](lectures/geo-strategy-09-putins-war-for-the-soul-of-russia.md), [#10](lectures/geo-strategy-10-putins-strategic-imagination.md), [#11](lectures/geo-strategy-11-the-second-american-civil-war.md), [#12 — Psychohistory (END)](lectures/geo-strategy-12-psychohistory-the-science-of-imagining-the-future.md) |
| Channel machine pulls | [../youtube-channels/predictive-history/](../youtube-channels/predictive-history/) |
| Transcript intake & analysis workflow | [WORKFLOW-transcripts.md](WORKFLOW-transcripts.md) |
| CIV-MEM analytic lens (conditions, institutions, seams) | [CIV-MEM-LENS.md](CIV-MEM-LENS.md) |
| Influence over time (metrics snapshots) | [influence-tracking/README.md](influence-tracking/README.md) |
| Prediction accuracy (forecast registry) | [prediction-tracking/README.md](prediction-tracking/README.md) |
| Divergence from mainstream (comparison registry) | [divergence-tracking/README.md](divergence-tracking/README.md) |

See [users/grace-mar/work-jiang.md](../../../users/grace-mar/work-jiang.md) for project purpose and method.
